revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Tsuijidō Entrance]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Tsuijidō Entrance]]</includeonly>

'''堤通出入口'''（つつみどおり－）は、[[東京都]][[墨田区]]にある[[首都高速道路]][[首都高速道路6号向島線|6号向島線]]の[[インターチェンジ]]である。
== 周辺 == * [[水神大橋]] * [[鐘淵陸橋]] * [[墨堤通り]]
== 隣のインターチェンジ == ;6号向島線 :[[向島出入口]] - '''堤通出入口''' - [[堀切ジャンクション]] ;（堀切ジャンクション経由）[[首都高速道路中央環状線|中央環状線]] :小菅出入口 - 堀切ジャンクション - [[四ツ木出入口]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 隣のインターチェンジ == ;6号向島線 :[[向島出入口]] - '''堤通出入口''' - [[堀切ジャンクション]] ;（堀切ジャンクション経由）[[首都高速道路中央環状線|中央環状線]] :[[小菅出入口]] - 堀切ジャンクション - [[四つ木出入口]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Cite sources|date=July 2024}} {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=Tokyo|number=461|align=left}} [[File:Suijin ohashi.jpg|thumb|200px|View from Sumida Ward, Tokyo (January 2008)]] [[File:Midukamioohashi.jpg|thumb|200px|View of Suijin Ōhashi from the Shuto Expressway (August 2005)]] [[File:100 views edo 037.jpg|thumb|200px|Suijin no Watashi]] '''Suijin Ōhashi''' (水神大橋) is a bridge spanning the {{ill|Sumida River|ja|隅田川}}, carrying a spur of the {{ill|Tokyo Metropo..."
revision.text:
{{Cite sources|date=July 2024}} {{Ja_Pref_Route_Sign|pref=Tokyo|number=461|align=left}} [[File:Suijin ohashi.jpg|thumb|200px|View from Sumida Ward, Tokyo (January 2008)]] [[File:Midukamioohashi.jpg|thumb|200px|View of Suijin Ōhashi from the Shuto Expressway (August 2005)]] [[File:100 views edo 037.jpg|thumb|200px|Suijin no Watashi]]
'''Suijin Ōhashi''' (水神大橋) is a bridge spanning the {{ill|Sumida River|ja|隅田川}}, carrying a spur of the {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 461|ja|東京都道461号吾妻橋伊興町線}}. The western end of the bridge is located in {{ill|Minami-Senju|ja|南千住}} 8-chōme, Arakawa Ward, while the eastern end is in Tsuijidō 2-chōme, Sumida Ward. The bridge's name originates from the nearby {{ill|Sumidagawa Shrine (Suijin-gū)|ja|隅田川神社}}, also known as Suijin-gū.
The bridge was first constructed in March 1989 (Heisei 1). Its assembly was carried out on land, and the bridge girders were transported on barges to the site, where tidal changes were used to place them on the piers.
Nearby parks, {{ill|Shioiri Park|ja|汐入公園}} and {{ill|Higashi Shirahige Park|ja|東白鬚公園}}, serve as disaster response bases for Tokyo. As part of the disaster preparedness plan, Suijin Ōhashi was built alongside {{ill|Senju Shioiri Bridge|ja|千住汐入大橋}} to connect these parks. Initially a pedestrian-only bridge, it was opened to vehicular traffic on July 10, 1996 (Heisei 8), following the completion of the connecting roads.
On its eastern side, Suijin Ōhashi connects to the {{ill|Shuto Expressway Mukōjima Line|ja|首都高速6号向島線}} at the {{ill|Tsuijidō Entrance|ja|堤通出入口}}.
This location was historically home to the ferry crossing "{{ill|Suijin no Watashi|ja|水神の渡し}}."
== Bridge Specifications == * '''Type''': Steel road bridge * '''Structure''': Three-span continuous Nielsen-Lohse girder arch bridge * '''Length''': 157.0 meters * '''Main span''': 102.0 meters * '''Width''': 17.0 meters * '''Construction started''': 1984 (Shōwa 59) * '''Completed''': March 1989 (Heisei 1) * '''Project owner''': Tokyo Metropolitan Government * '''Design''': Tokyo Engineering * '''Girder fabrication''': {{ill|Mitsubishi Heavy Industries|ja|三菱重工業}}
== Public Transportation == * '''{{ill|Toei Bus|ja|都営バス}}''' - {{ill|Route 40|ja|都営バス南千住営業所#錦40系統}}: {{ill|Minami-Senju Station|ja|南千住駅}} East Exit - Sumida 2-chōme - Shirahige Bridge - Higashi Mukōjima Hirokōji - {{ill|Tokyo Skytree Station|ja|とうきょうスカイツリー駅}} Front - {{ill|Kinshichō Station|ja|錦糸町駅}} Front
== Nearby Bridges == * {{ill|Sumida River|ja|隅田川}} : (Upstream) - {{ill|Sumida River Bridge (Tokyo Metro Hibiya Line)|ja|隅田川橋梁 (東京地下鉄日比谷線)}} - {{ill|Senju Shioiri Bridge|ja|千住汐入大橋}} - '''Suijin Ōhashi''' - {{ill|Shirahige Bridge|ja|白鬚橋}} - {{ill|Sakura Bridge (Tokyo)|ja|桜橋 (東京都)}} - (Downstream)

Ent 1.JPG|300px |image_caption = Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit (Hakozaki JCT direction) |road_name1 = {{ill|Shuto Expressway Route 6 Mukojima Line|ja|首都高速6号向島線}} |number1 = 609,610 |sign1 = Tsutsumidori {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 461|ja|東京都道461号吾妻橋伊興町線}} (Sumitei-dori) Senju |origin1 = {{ill|Edobashi Junction|ja|江戸橋ジャンクション}} |distance1 = (Upward line) 7.5 km
(Downward line) 8.5 km |previous_facility1 = {{ill|Mukojima Entrance/Exit|ja|向島出入口}} |distanceA1 = 1.2 km |next_facility1 = {{ill|Horikiri Junction|ja|堀切ジャンクション}} |distanceB1 = 1.0 km |general_roads = |opening_date = [[March 30]], [[1982]] (Showa 57) |daily_traffic_volume = vehicles/day |postal_code = 131-0034 |address = [[Tokyo]], [[Sumida City|Sumida Ward]], [[Tsutsumidori]] 2-chome }} '''Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit''' (つつみどおりでいりぐち) is an {{ill|interchange (road)|ja|インターチェンジ|lt=interchange}} on the {{ill|Mukojima Route|ja|首都高速6号向島線|Mukojima Route=Mukojima Route|lt=Shuto Expressway Route 6 Mukojima Line}} located in {{ill|Sumida City|ja|墨田区}}, [[Tokyo]]. It is a {{ill|Interchange_(road)|ja|フルインターチェンジ|Interchange_(road)=Interchange_(road)|lt=full interchange}} with both entrances and exits for traffic in both directions. Additionally, the neighboring {{ill|Mukojima Entrance/Exit|ja|向島出入口}} (exits only) is also located within the Tsutsumidori area of Sumida Ward. [[File:Tsutsumidori Ent 2.JPG|thumb|Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit (Horikiri JCT direction)]] == Surrounding Area == * {{ill|Suijin Bridge|ja|水神大橋}} * {{ill|Kanegafuchi Overpass|ja|鐘ヶ淵陸橋}} * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 461|ja|東京都道461号吾妻橋伊興町線}} (Sumitei-dori Avenue) * {{ill|Tobu Isesaki Line|ja|東武伊勢崎線}} ({{ill|Tobu Skytree Line|ja|東武スカイツリーライン}}) {{ill|Kanegafuchi Station|ja|鐘ヶ淵駅}} * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Rehabilitation Hospital|ja|東京都リハビリテーション病院}} * {{ill|Shirahige East Apartments|ja|白鬚東アパート}} * {{ill|Higashishirahige Park|ja|東白鬚公園}} * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan College of Industrial Technology|ja|東京都立産業技術高等専門学校}} (Arakawa Campus) * {{ill|Shioiri Park|ja|汐入公園}} == Adjacent Interchanges == ; {{高速道路施設 |施設名 = 堤通出入口 |色 = #bfb |画像ファイル = Tsutsumidori Ent 1.JPG|300px |画像説明 = 堤通出入口（箱崎JCT方面側） |道路名1 = [[ファイル:Shuto Urban Expwy Sign 6-Mukojima.svg|24px]][[首都高速6号向島線]] |番号1 = 609,610 |標識1 = 堤通 [[東京都道461号吾妻橋伊興町線|墨堤通り]] 千住 |起点1 = [[江戸橋ジャンクション|江戸橋JCT]] |距離1 = (上り線)7.5km
（下り線)8.5 |前の施設1 = [[向島出入口]] |距離A1 = 1.2 |次の施設1 = [[堀切ジャンクション|堀切JCT]] |距離B1 = 1.0 |一般道 = |供用開始日 = [[1982年]]（昭和57年）[[3月30日]] |通行台数 = 台/日 |郵便番号 = 131-0034 |住所 = [[東京都]][[墨田区]][[堤通]]二丁目 }} '''堤通出入口'''（つつみどおりでいりぐち）は、[[東京都]][[墨田区]]にある[[首都高速道路]][[首都高速6号向島線|6号向島線]]の[[インターチェンジ|出入口]]である。上下線双方の出口・入口とも設置されている[[フルインターチェンジ]]である。なお、堤通出入口のある墨田区[[堤通]]には、このほかに隣のインターチェンジである[[向島出入口]]（のうち、上下線の出口部分だけ）も存在する。 [[File:Tsutsumidori Ent 2.JPG|thumb|堤通出入口（堀切JCT方面側）]] == 周辺 == * [[水神大橋]] * [[鐘ヶ淵陸橋]] * [[東京都道461号吾妻橋伊興町線|墨堤通り]] * [[東武伊勢崎線|東武スカイツリーライン]][[鐘ヶ淵駅]] * [[東京都リハビリテーション病院]] * [[白鬚東アパート]] * [[東白鬚公園]] * [[東京都立産業技術高等専門学校荒川キャンパス]] * [[汐入公園]] == 隣 == ; [[ファイル:Shuto Urban Expwy Sign 6-Mukojima.svg|24px]][[首都高速6号向島線]] : (606,607)[[向島出入口]] - '''(609,610)堤通出入口''' - [[堀切ジャンクション|堀切JCT]] ==料金所== ===三郷方面=== *レーン数：2 **ETC専用：1 **ETC・一般：1 ===銀座方面=== *レーン数：2 **ETC専用：1 **ETC・一般：1 == 関連項目 == * [[日本のインターチェンジ一覧]] == 外部リンク == * [https://www.shutoko.jp/ 首都高速道路株式会社] * [https://www.shutoko-sv.jp/ 首都高速道路サービス株式会社] {{首都高速6号向島線}} {{Road-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つつみとおりていりくち}} [[Category:日本のインターチェンジ つ|つみとおり]] [[Category:首都高速道路のランプ|つつみとおり]] [[Category:墨田区の交通]] [[Category:1982年開業の道路施設]]

(Downward line) 8.5 km |previous_facility1 = {{ill|Mukojima Entrance/Exit|ja|向島出入口|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukojima Entrance/Exit|qq=}} |distanceA1 = 1.2 km |next_facility1 = {{ill|Horikiri Junction|ja|堀切ジャンクション|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikiri Junction|qq=}} |distanceB1 = 1.0 km |general_roads = |opening_date = [[March 30]], [[1982]] (Showa 57) |daily_traffic_volume = vehicles/day |postal_code = 131-0034 |address = [[Tokyo]], [[Sumida City|Sumida Ward]], [[Tsutsumidori]] 2-chome }} '''Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit''' (つつみどおりでいりぐち) is an [[:en:Interchange (road)|interchange]] on the [[:en:Mukojima Route|Shuto Expressway Route 6 Mukojima Line]] located in [[:en:Sumida, Tokyo|Sumida City]], [[Tokyo]]. It is a {{ill|Interchange_(road)|ja|フルインターチェンジ|Interchange_(road)=Interchange_(road)|lt=full interchange|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Interchange_(road)|qq=}} with both entrances and exits for traffic in both directions. Additionally, the neighboring {{ill|Mukojima Entrance/Exit|ja|向島出入口|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukojima Entrance/Exit|qq=}} (exits only) is also located within the Tsutsumidori area of Sumida Ward. [[File:Tsutsumidori Ent 2.JPG|thumb|Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit (Horikiri JCT direction)]] == Surrounding Area == * {{ill|Suijin Bridge|ja|水神大橋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suijin Bridge|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanegafuchi Overpass|ja|鐘ヶ淵陸橋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanegafuchi Overpass|qq=}} * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 461|ja|東京都道461号吾妻橋伊興町線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 461|qq=}} (Sumitei-dori Avenue) * [[:en:Tobu Isesaki Line|Tobu Isesaki Line]] ([[:en:Tobu Skytree Line|Tobu Skytree Line]]) [[:en:Kanegafuchi Station|Kanegafuchi Station]] * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Rehabilitation Hospital|ja|東京都リハビリテーション病院|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Rehabilitation Hospital|qq=}} * {{ill|Shirahige East Apartments|ja|白鬚東アパート|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirahige East Apartments|qq=}} * {{ill|Higashishirahige Park|ja|東白鬚公園|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashishirahige Park|qq=}} * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan College of Industrial Technology|ja|東京都立産業技術高等専門学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan College of Industrial Technology|qq=}} (Arakawa Campus) * {{ill|Shioiri Park|ja|汐入公園|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shioiri Park|qq=}} == Adjacent Interchanges == ; [[:en:Mukojima Route|Shuto Expressway Route 6 Mukojima Line]] : (606,607) {{ill|Mukojima Entrance/Exit|ja|向島出入口|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukojima Entrance/Exit|qq=}} * '''(609,610) Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit''' - {{ill|Horikiri Junction|ja|堀切ジャンクション|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikiri Junction|qq=}} == Toll Gates == === '''Mitsudo Direction''' === * Number of Lanes: 2 ** ETC Only: 1 ** ETC & General: 1 === '''Ginza Direction''' === * Number of Lanes: 2 ** ETC Only: 1 ** ETC & General: 1 == See Also == * {{ill|List of interchanges in Japan|ja|日本のインターチェンジ一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of interchanges in Japan|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://www.shutoko.jp/ Shuto Expressway Company Limited] * [https://www.shutoko-sv.jp/ Shuto Expressway Service Company Limited] [[:en:Mukojima Route|Shuto Expressway Route 6 Mukojima Line]] {{Road-stub}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] {{translated page|ja|堤通出入口|version=84053024|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[sn:Tsuijidō Entrance]][[Category:Peripheral articles]] [[Category:Bridges in Tokyo]] [[Category:Transport in Arakawa Ward]] [[Category:Minami-Senju]] [[Category:Bridges in Sumida Ward]] [[Category:Sumida River bridges]] [[Category:Interchanges in Japan|T]] [[Category:Transportation in Sumida City]] [[Category:Road facilities opened in 1982]] [[Category:11a]] [[Category:pages from jawiki]] }} [[sn:Tsuijidō Entrance]] [[ja:堤通出入口]] [[ja:水神の渡し]] [[ja:三菱重工業]] [[ja:都営バス]] [[ja:都営バス南千住営業所=錦40系統]] [[ja:南千住駅]] [[ja:とうきょうスカイツリー駅]] [[ja:錦糸町駅]] [[ja:隅田川]] [[ja:隅田川橋梁 (東京地下鉄日比谷線)]] [[ja:千住汐入大橋]] [[ja:白鬚橋]] [[ja:桜橋 (東京都)]] [[ja:水神大橋]] [[sn:suijidō Entrance]] [[en:Tsuijidō Entrance]] [[Category:1982年開業の道路施設]] [[Category:Transport in Sumida, Tokyo]] [[Category:日本のインターチェンジ つ]] [[Category:Interchanges of Metropolitan Expressway (Tokyo)]]

(Downward line) 8.5 km |previous_facility1 = {{ill|Mukojima Entrance/Exit|ja|向島出入口|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukojima Entrance/Exit|qq=}} |distanceA1 = 1.2 km |next_facility1 = {{ill|Horikiri Junction|ja|堀切ジャンクション|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikiri Junction|qq=}} |distanceB1 = 1.0 km |general_roads = |opening_date = [[March 30]], [[1982]] (Showa 57) |daily_traffic_volume = vehicles/day |postal_code = 131-0034 |address = [[Tokyo]], [[Sumida City|Sumida Ward]], [[Tsutsumidori]] 2-chome }} '''Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit''' (つつみどおりでいりぐち) is an [[:en:Interchange (road)|interchange]] on the [[:en:Mukojima Route|Shuto Expressway Route 6 Mukojima Line]] located in [[:en:Sumida, Tokyo|Sumida City]], [[Tokyo]]. It is a {{ill|Interchange_(road)|ja|フルインターチェンジ|Interchange_(road)=Interchange_(road)|lt=full interchange|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Interchange_(road)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to インターチェンジ}} with both entrances and exits for traffic in both directions. Additionally, the neighboring {{ill|Mukojima Entrance/Exit|ja|向島出入口|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukojima Entrance/Exit|qq=}} (exits only) is also located within the Tsutsumidori area of Sumida Ward. [[File:Tsutsumidori Ent 2.JPG|thumb|Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit (Horikiri JCT direction)]] == Surrounding Area == * {{ill|Suijin Bridge|ja|水神大橋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suijin Bridge|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanegafuchi Overpass|ja|鐘ヶ淵陸橋|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanegafuchi Overpass|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Route 461|ja|東京都道461号吾妻橋伊興町線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Route 461|qq=}} (Sumitei-dori Avenue) * [[:en:Tobu Isesaki Line|Tobu Isesaki Line]] ([[:en:Tobu Skytree Line|Tobu Skytree Line]]) [[:en:Kanegafuchi Station|Kanegafuchi Station]] * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan Rehabilitation Hospital|ja|東京都リハビリテーション病院|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan Rehabilitation Hospital|qq=}} * {{ill|Shirahige East Apartments|ja|白鬚東アパート|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirahige East Apartments|qq=}} * {{ill|Higashishirahige Park|ja|東白鬚公園|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashishirahige Park|qq=}} * {{ill|Tokyo Metropolitan College of Industrial Technology|ja|東京都立産業技術高等専門学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokyo Metropolitan College of Industrial Technology|qq=}} (Arakawa Campus) * {{ill|Shioiri Park|ja|汐入公園|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shioiri Park|qq=}} == Adjacent Interchanges == ; [[:en:Mukojima Route|Shuto Expressway Route 6 Mukojima Line]] : (606,607) {{ill|Mukojima Entrance/Exit|ja|向島出入口|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mukojima Entrance/Exit|qq=}} * '''(609,610) Tsutsumidori Entrance/Exit''' - {{ill|Horikiri Junction|ja|堀切ジャンクション|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horikiri Junction|qq=}} == Toll Gates == === '''Mitsudo Direction''' === * Number of Lanes: 2 ** ETC Only: 1 ** ETC & General: 1 === '''Ginza Direction''' === * Number of Lanes: 2 ** ETC Only: 1 ** ETC & General: 1 == See Also == * {{ill|List of interchanges in Japan|ja|日本のインターチェンジ一覧|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of interchanges in Japan|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://www.shutoko.jp/ Shuto Expressway Company Limited] * [https://www.shutoko-sv.jp/ Shuto Expressway Service Company Limited] [[:en:Mukojima Route|Shuto Expressway Route 6 Mukojima Line]] {{Road-stub}} [[Category:completion tier 1]] {{translated page|ja|堤通出入口|version=84053024|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[sn:Tsuijidō Entrance]] [[Category:Bridges in Tokyo]] }} [[sn:Tsuijidō Entrance]] [[ja:堤通出入口]] [[ja:水神の渡し]] [[ja:三菱重工業]] [[ja:都営バス]] [[ja:都営バス南千住営業所=錦40系統]] [[ja:南千住駅]] [[ja:とうきょうスカイツリー駅]] [[ja:錦糸町駅]] [[ja:隅田川]] [[ja:隅田川橋梁 (東京地下鉄日比谷線)]] [[ja:千住汐入大橋]] [[ja:白鬚橋]] [[ja:桜橋 (東京都)]] [[ja:水神大橋]] [[sn:suijidō Entrance]] [[Category:1982の Road facilities opened in]] [[Category:Transport in Sumida, Tokyo]] [[Category:日本のインターチェンジ つ]] [[Category:Interchanges of Metropolitan Expressway (Tokyo)]] [[zh:堤通出入口]]
